name: Research & Summarize
description: Research a topic with branching depth, iterative refinement, and final summary.
goal: Research the given topic thoroughly and produce a concise summary

nodes.name: Initial Research
nodes.prompt: Research the topic: {{var:topic}}. Provide an initial overview covering key concepts, recent developments, and open questions.

nodes.name: Refine Research
nodes.prompt:
Expand on the research so far. Add more detail, find additional perspectives, and address gaps:

{{previous_output}}

nodes.name: Final Summary
nodes.prompt:
Synthesize all findings into a concise, well-structured summary report:

{{all_predecessors}}
